chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4280 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 07-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. This petition is pending since 2023 without any significant progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
